headline: Illinois American Water Offers Convenient Ways for Customers to Pay Their Bills
summary: By signing up for MyWater, Illinois American Water's online portal, customers can log in quickly and securely to make bill payments and opt-in to Auto Pay. The company accepts a variety of payment methods to cater to its customers, including Apple Pay, Google Pay, Venmo and PayPal.

headline: What to Expect From American Water Works's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: American Water Works is approaching its first-quarter earnings release this month, and Wall Street is forecasting a high single-digit percentage rise in earnings.

headline: American Water's 2026 First Quarter Conference Call Scheduled for April 30, 2026
summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced today that it intends to release its 2026 first quarter financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, April 29, 2026.

raw.summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced today that it intends to release its 2026 first quarter financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, April 29, 2026.

headline: Indiana American Water Launches Major PFAS Treatment Project to Strengthen Terre Haute Water Quality
summary: Indiana American Water today announced plans to construct its second advanced drinking water treatment system designed to remove per‑ and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) at its Terre Haute operations. With an estimated budget of approximately $19 million, this project builds on the company's ongoing infrastructure investments and its statewide PFAS mitigation program. It also follows the successful completion of Indiana's first PFAS treatment system in Charlestown earlier this year.
